name: Soluna
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Soluna (Bruno Faidutti, 2012; Blue Orange / Steffen-Spiele): 12 shared celestial discs are dealt at random as 12 single-disc stacks. On your turn move any whole stack on top of another stack showing the same top symbol OR of the same height. Neither player owns anything; whoever makes the last possible move wins. A 5-minute brain-burner solved fresh every deal.
